description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden shelving unit with a flat top and four open shelves above a two-door cabinet at the bottom. The shelves are filled with various books of different sizes and colors, and the bottom shelf contains several small bottles or flasks. The cabinet doors have small round handles, suggesting they can be opened for additional storage. The exterior is finished in a medium brown color, with a slightly darker interior backing. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, libraries, or residential spaces.
description: A tall brown wooden shelving unit with four shelves filled with books and bottles, and a two-door cabinet at the bottom.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat, rectangular profile of the shelving unit with no visible shelves or contents.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the solid back panel of the shelving unit, with no visible shelves or contents.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the flat, rectangular profile seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view showing four shelves filled with books and bottles, and a two-door cabinet with handles at the bottom.
